text: Trump Bought MARA Shares in Q1 2026, OGE Disclosure Shows U.S. Office of Government Ethics (OGE) financial disclosure documents reveal that President Trump purchased securities of Bitcoin mining company MARA Holdings (MARA) during the first quarter of 2026 (January to March). According to the filings, Trump conducted large-scale securities trading in the period, with total transaction values ranging between $220 million and $750 million. The trades involved major U.S. companies including Microsoft, Meta, Oracle, Broadcom, Goldman Sachs, Bank of America, as well as S&P 500 index funds, Nvidia, and Apple. The documents do not specify exact prices, transaction dates, or accounts involved. Trump's assets are held in a trust controlled by his children. According to financial disclosure documents released by the U.S. Office of Government Ethics (OGE), entities held in trust by Donald Trump's children also purchased shares of Coinbase Global (COIN), MicroStrategy (MSTR), Robinhood Markets (HOOD), SoFi Technologies (SOFI), and Block Inc. (SQ) during the same period, adding exposure to crypto-related equities. — link
author: admin#1534592031

text: Highlight Clip Bybit CEO Ben: I Trust My Own Brain More Than AI In an April 23 interview with When Shift Happens, Bybit CEO Ben Zhou shared his thoughts after using AI extensively. He said heavy AI use made him feel like he had "come back to square one," and he no longer expects AI to become a super-intelligent assistant. Zhou said that even when he asks Claude or other AI agents to remind him of tasks, he often does not look at the reminders when they appear and may even find them distracting. In the end, he said he still relies on his own brain to decide what truly matters in the moment — link

text: "Today, Coinbase announced its plan to expand support of Hyperliquid by becoming the official treasury deployer of USDC as an Aligned Quote Asset. Under AQAv2, treasury deployers will share the vast majority of the reserve yield revenue on their Hyperliquid supply with the protocol. As part of this transition, Native Markets has agreed to terms granting Coinbase the right to purchase the USDH brand assets. Coinbase will now carry on the AQA torch while continuing to deliver value to the Assistance Fund and empowering Hyperliquid with one of the strongest voices for crypto in the United States."

author: admin#1811915252

text: Is Software Losing Its Head? > As AI agents bypass software UIs entirely and interact directly with underlying data via APIs, the traditional defensibility of systems of record built on human habit, muscle memory, and interface stickiness is collapsing. > The new moats shift toward proprietary data generation, compliance-critical trust layers, real-world execution, and agent permissioning logic. > The next generation of software won't just store records, but initiate work, close action loops, and coordinate across parties. Source:

text: "Behind-the-scenes" software lets researchers build virtual worlds where robots can safely practice tasks on a computer before trying them in real life Not all simulation tools work the same way. Some are super flexible and easy to tweak, while others focus on speed so the robot's AI can learn from thousands of practice runs quickly He shows how one tool makes something basic - like tracking a robot's position and direction - much cleaner and simpler in the code than another popular tool. Little design choices like this can save researchers a lot of time and headaches

text: Everything in life compounds - not just money. Your skills, health, mindset, relationships, and knowledge all grow (or shrink) through small, consistent daily actions The author argues that most people stay "average" because they chase quick wins promoted by "casino culture" and the attention economy. The real winners adopt a decade-long perspective, focus on controllable daily inputs, and simply refuse to quit. Over time, these ordinary habits make some people completely unrecognizable Key quote (Sam Altman): "Compounding is magic. Look for it everywhere. Early progress is invisible, which causes most people to quit. Your effort and experience never go to waste if you persist Casino culture & attention economy are the enemies - These push "get rich quick / minimal effort" thinking: random outcomes, instant rewards, and endless next bets. They train you to hate slow, boring, consistent work

text: World's Largest Listed Solana Treasury Firm Sits on Nearly $1B Paper Loss Forward Industries (NASDAQ: FWDI), a Solana-focused treasury company backed by a $1.65 billion PIPE led by Galaxy Digital, Jump Crypto and Multicoin Capital, holds 6,979,967.46 SOL as of Jan. 15, 2026 and reports a 6.73% gross staking APY, with nearly all SOL staked. The company previously disclosed SOL purchases at a net cost of about $232.08 per SOL; with SOL trading far below that level, its mark-to-market unrealized loss is approaching $1 billion. In its quarter ended Dec. 31, 2025 filing, Forward reported a net loss of $585.65 million, including a $560.21 million loss on digital assets, while staking rewards for the period were $17.38 million. — link
